properties.description: This notebook creates the Gold Layer table 'wi_rehandle_forecast' for the pooling forecast dashboards.

source:
# ============================================================
# CONFIGURATION
# ============================================================

storage_account = "navispowerbidatastorage2"

# Source: Silver Layer
silver_path = f"abfss://workinstruction@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/{file_system}/"

# Destination: Gold Layer (combined for all terminals)
gold_path = f"abfss://workinstruction@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/wi_rehandle_forecast_test/"

# Configurable Parameters
WEIGHT_TOLERANCE_KG = 3000  # Weight tolerance for checks
LOAD_KIND = "LOAD"          # Filter for LOAD moves only

print(f"🔄 Processing Terminal: {client_id}")
print(f"📂 Silver Path: {silver_path}")
print(f"📂 Gold Path: {gold_path}")

# ============================================================
# READ SILVER DATA - LATEST ONLY
# ============================================================

# Read Silver Delta table
silver_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(silver_path)

# Register temp view
silver_df.createOrReplaceTempView("silver_wi_all")

# Get max source_file_name_sort (latest file)
max_sort = spark.sql("SELECT MAX(source_file_name_sort) AS max_sort FROM silver_wi_all").collect()[0]["max_sort"]

print(f"📂 Latest source_file_name_sort: {max_sort}")

# Filter to latest data only
latest_df = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT * 
    FROM silver_wi_all 
    WHERE source_file_name_sort = {max_sort}
""")

latest_df.createOrReplaceTempView("silver_wi")

total_records = latest_df.count()
load_records = latest_df.filter("kind = 'LOAD'").count()

print(f"✅ Total records (latest): {total_records:,}")
print(f"✅ LOAD records: {load_records:,}")

%%sql

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 1: BASE DATA - Filter LOAD and add derived columns
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW base_data AS

SELECT
    client_id,
    client_key,
    source_file_name,
    source_file_name_sort,
    integration_key,
    unit_nbr,
    unit_position,
    unit_position_type,
    unit_position_1,       
    unit_position_2,        
    unit_position_3,        
    unit_position_4,        
    unit_tier_num,
    wi_position,
    wi_position_type,
    wi_position_1,          -- Bay for vessel
    wi_position_2,          -- Full slot for vessel
    wi_position_3,
    wi_position_4,
    wi_tier_num,
    carrier,
    CAST(NULLIF(unit_vgm__kg, '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS unit_vgm_kg,
    unit_type_length,
    pow_pow_name AS crane,
    unit_pod,
    queue,
    CAST(NULLIF(queue_seq, '') AS INT) AS queue_seq,
    est_mv_time,
    status,
    kind,
    load_timestamp
FROM silver_wi
WHERE kind = 'LOAD'
  AND unit_position_3 IS NOT NULL 
  AND unit_position_3 != ''

%%sql

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 2: Calculate counts for majority determination
-- Using source_file_name_sort (bigint) for partitioning
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW with_counts AS

SELECT
    *,
    
    -- Count occurrences for majority calculations
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, crane) AS crane_count,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, carrier) AS carrier_count,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, unit_pod) AS pod_count,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, wi_position_1) AS bay_count,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, queue) AS queue_count,
    
    -- Stack level aggregations
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3) AS units_in_stack,
    MAX(unit_tier_num) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3) AS max_tier_in_stack,
    MIN(unit_tier_num) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3) AS min_tier_in_stack,
    MIN(unit_vgm_kg) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3) AS min_weight_in_stack,
    MAX(unit_vgm_kg) OVER (PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3) AS max_weight_in_stack

FROM base_data

%%sql

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 3: Determine majority values using FIRST_VALUE
-- Using source_file_name_sort (bigint) for partitioning
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW with_majorities AS

SELECT
    *,
    
    -- Majority Crane (most frequent crane in stack)
    FIRST_VALUE(crane) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY crane_count DESC, crane
    ) AS majority_crane,

     FIRST_VALUE(carrier) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY carrier_count DESC, carrier
    ) AS majority_carrier,
    
    -- Majority POD (most frequent POD in stack)
    FIRST_VALUE(unit_pod) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY pod_count DESC, unit_pod
    ) AS majority_pod,
    
    -- Majority Bay (most frequent bay in stack)
    FIRST_VALUE(wi_position_1) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY bay_count DESC, wi_position_1
    ) AS majority_bay,
    
    -- Majority Queue (most frequent queue in stack)
    FIRST_VALUE(queue) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY queue_count DESC, queue
    ) AS majority_queue

FROM with_counts

%%sql

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 4: Add sequences and LAG/LEAD functions
-- Using source_file_name_sort (bigint) for partitioning
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW with_sequences AS

SELECT
    *,
    
    -- Load sequence (by est_mv_time within stack)
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY est_mv_time
    ) AS load_sequence,
    
    -- Queue sequence within same queue
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, queue 
        ORDER BY est_mv_time
    ) AS load_sequence_in_queue,
    
    -- Expected queue position
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, queue 
        ORDER BY queue_seq
    ) AS expected_queue_position,
    
    -- Previous weight (for weight comparison)
    LAG(unit_vgm_kg) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY est_mv_time
    ) AS prev_weight,
    
    -- Running min tier loaded before this unit
    MIN(unit_tier_num) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY est_mv_time 
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
    ) AS min_tier_loaded_before_this,
    
    -- Collect tiers for display
    CONCAT_WS(',', COLLECT_LIST(unit_position_4) OVER (
        PARTITION BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3 
        ORDER BY unit_tier_num
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    )) AS tiers_in_plan

FROM with_majorities

%%sql
-- ============================================================
-- CTE 5: Calculate rehandles - CORRECTED VERSION
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW with_rehandles AS

WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        -- Total rehandles calculation
        CASE 
            WHEN min_tier_loaded_before_this IS NULL THEN 
                max_tier_in_stack - unit_tier_num
            WHEN unit_tier_num >= min_tier_loaded_before_this THEN 
                0
            ELSE 
                min_tier_loaded_before_this - unit_tier_num - 1
        END AS total_rehandles
    FROM with_sequences
),

-- Case 1: First unit (min_tier_loaded_before_this IS NULL)
-- Count units ABOVE that load LATER
avoidable_case1 AS (
    SELECT 
        a.source_file_name_sort,
        a.unit_position_3,
        a.integration_key,
        COUNT(b.integration_key) AS higher_tiers_after
    FROM base a
    LEFT JOIN base b
        ON a.source_file_name_sort = b.source_file_name_sort
        AND a.unit_position_3 = b.unit_position_3
        AND b.unit_tier_num > a.unit_tier_num      -- Units ABOVE current
        AND b.est_mv_time > a.est_mv_time          -- That load LATER
    WHERE a.min_tier_loaded_before_this IS NULL
    GROUP BY 
        a.source_file_name_sort,
        a.unit_position_3,
        a.integration_key
),

-- Case 3: Rehandle case (tier < min_tier_loaded_before_this)
-- Count units ABOVE current but BELOW already-loaded minimum (NO time filter)
avoidable_case3 AS (
    SELECT 
        a.source_file_name_sort,
        a.unit_position_3,
        a.integration_key,
        COUNT(b.integration_key) AS higher_tiers_after
    FROM base a
    LEFT JOIN base b
        ON a.source_file_name_sort = b.source_file_name_sort
        AND a.unit_position_3 = b.unit_position_3
        AND b.unit_tier_num > a.unit_tier_num                  -- Units ABOVE current
        AND b.unit_tier_num < a.min_tier_loaded_before_this    -- But BELOW already loaded
    WHERE a.min_tier_loaded_before_this IS NOT NULL
      AND a.unit_tier_num < a.min_tier_loaded_before_this
    GROUP BY 
        a.source_file_name_sort,
        a.unit_position_3,
        a.integration_key
)

SELECT 
    b.*,
    CASE 
        WHEN b.min_tier_loaded_before_this IS NULL THEN 
            COALESCE(c1.higher_tiers_after, 0)
        WHEN b.unit_tier_num >= b.min_tier_loaded_before_this THEN 
            0
        ELSE 
            COALESCE(c3.higher_tiers_after, 0)
    END AS avoidable_rehandles
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN avoidable_case1 c1
    ON b.source_file_name_sort = c1.source_file_name_sort
    AND b.unit_position_3 = c1.unit_position_3
    AND b.integration_key = c1.integration_key
LEFT JOIN avoidable_case3 c3
    ON b.source_file_name_sort = c3.source_file_name_sort
    AND b.unit_position_3 = c3.unit_position_3
    AND b.integration_key = c3.integration_key

%%sql
CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW gold_load_report AS

SELECT
    client_id,
    client_key,
    source_file_name_sort,
    integration_key,
    unit_nbr,
    unit_position_3 AS unit_position_stack,
    unit_position_4 AS unit_position_tier,
    unit_tier_num,
    wi_position_1 AS wi_bay,
    est_mv_time,
    units_in_stack,
    max_tier_in_stack,
    min_tier_in_stack,
    tiers_in_plan,
    load_sequence,

    -- Quality Checks
    CASE WHEN load_sequence_in_queue = expected_queue_position THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS queue_in_order,
    CASE WHEN unit_pod = majority_pod THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS pod_same_in_stack,
    CASE WHEN carrier = majority_carrier THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as carrier_same_in_stack,
    CASE WHEN crane = majority_crane THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS crane_same_in_stack,
    CASE WHEN queue = majority_queue THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS queue_same_in_stack,
    CASE WHEN prev_weight IS NULL OR ABS(unit_vgm_kg - prev_weight) <= 3000 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS weight_within_3t_of_prev,
    CASE WHEN (max_weight_in_stack - min_weight_in_stack) <= 3000 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS stack_weight_range_ok,
    CASE WHEN wi_position_1 = majority_bay THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS bay_same_in_stack,
    CASE 
        WHEN load_sequence_in_queue = expected_queue_position
             AND unit_pod = majority_pod
             AND crane = majority_crane
             AND carrier = majority_carrier
             AND queue = majority_queue
             AND (prev_weight IS NULL OR ABS(unit_vgm_kg - prev_weight) <= 3000)
             AND wi_position_1 = majority_bay
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS all_checks_pass,
    
    -- Rehandles (directly from with_rehandles)
    total_rehandles,
    avoidable_rehandles,
    total_rehandles - avoidable_rehandles AS unavoidable_rehandles,
    CASE 
        WHEN total_rehandles = 0 THEN 'None'
        WHEN avoidable_rehandles = total_rehandles THEN 'Avoidable'
        WHEN avoidable_rehandles = 0 THEN 'Unavoidable'
        ELSE 'Mixed'
    END AS rehandle_type,
    
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS report_generated_at
    
FROM with_rehandles
ORDER BY source_file_name_sort, unit_position_3, est_mv_time

# ============================================================
# PREVIEW GOLD DATA
# ============================================================

gold_df = spark.sql("SELECT * FROM gold_load_report")

total_records = gold_df.count()
stacks_count = gold_df.select("unit_position_stack").distinct().count()

print(f"✅ Gold records: {total_records:,}")
print(f"📊 Unique stacks: {stacks_count:,}")

# Preview key columns
print("\n📋 Sample Data - Key Columns:")
gold_df.select(
    "unit_nbr",
    "client_key",
    "unit_position_stack",
    "unit_position_tier",
    "unit_tier_num",
    "load_sequence",
    "units_in_stack",
    "all_checks_pass"
).orderBy("unit_position_stack", "load_sequence").show(20, truncate=False)

# Preview Quality Checks
print("\n📋 Sample Data - Quality Checks:")
gold_df.select(
    "unit_nbr",
    "unit_position_stack",
    "queue_in_order",
    "pod_same_in_stack",
    "crane_same_in_stack",
    "queue_same_in_stack",
    "weight_within_3t_of_prev",
    "stack_weight_range_ok",
    "bay_same_in_stack",
    "all_checks_pass"
).orderBy("unit_position_stack", "load_sequence").show(20, truncate=False)

# Preview Rehandle Analysis
print("\n📋 Sample Data - Rehandle Analysis:")
gold_df.select(
    "unit_nbr",
    "unit_position_stack",
    "unit_position_tier",
    "load_sequence",
    "total_rehandles",
    "avoidable_rehandles",
    "unavoidable_rehandles",
    "rehandle_type"
).orderBy("unit_position_stack", "load_sequence").show(20, truncate=False)

# Quality Check Summary
print("\n" + "="*60)
print("📊 QUALITY CHECK SUMMARY")
print("="*60)
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_units,
        SUM(CASE WHEN queue_in_order = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN pod_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pod_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN crane_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS crane_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN queue_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_same_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN weight_within_3t_of_prev = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weight_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN stack_weight_range_ok = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stack_wt_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bay_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bay_ok,
        SUM(CASE WHEN all_checks_pass = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_pass
    FROM gold_load_report
""").show()

# Quality Check Percentage
print("\n📊 QUALITY CHECK PASS RATE (%):")
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN queue_in_order = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS queue_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pod_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS pod_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN crane_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS crane_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN queue_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS queue_same_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN weight_within_3t_of_prev = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS weight_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN stack_weight_range_ok = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS stack_wt_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN bay_same_in_stack = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS bay_pct,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN all_checks_pass = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS all_pass_pct
    FROM gold_load_report
""").show()

# Rehandle Summary
print("\n" + "="*60)
print("📊 REHANDLE SUMMARY")
print("="*60)
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        rehandle_type,
        COUNT(*) AS unit_count,
        SUM(total_rehandles) AS total_rehandles,
        SUM(avoidable_rehandles) AS avoidable,
        SUM(unavoidable_rehandles) AS unavoidable
    FROM gold_load_report
    GROUP BY rehandle_type
    ORDER BY unit_count DESC
""").show()

# Stack Summary
print("\n📊 STACK SIZE DISTRIBUTION:")
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        units_in_stack,
        COUNT(DISTINCT unit_position_stack) AS stack_count
    FROM gold_load_report
    GROUP BY units_in_stack
    ORDER BY units_in_stack
""").show()

# All Checks Pass Summary
print("\n📊 ALL CHECKS PASS SUMMARY:")
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        all_checks_pass,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) AS percentage
    FROM gold_load_report
    GROUP BY all_checks_pass
""").show()

print(f"\n✅ Preview completed for {client_id}!")

# ============================================================
# WRITE TO GOLD LAYER (APPEND MODE - With client_id Partitioning)
# ============================================================

from delta.tables import DeltaTable

gold_df = spark.sql("SELECT * FROM gold_load_report")

# Get the source_file_name_sort being processed
current_file_sort = gold_df.select("source_file_name_sort").first()[0]

try:
    if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, gold_path):
        # Check if this file already exists in Gold for this client
        existing_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(gold_path)
        
        file_exists = existing_df.filter(
            f"client_id = '{client_id}' AND source_file_name_sort = {current_file_sort}"
        ).limit(1).count() > 0
        
        if file_exists:
            print(f"⚠️ Data for client_id = '{client_id}', source_file_name_sort = {current_file_sort} already exists. Skipping...")
        else:
            # Append new data
            gold_df.write \
                .format("delta") \
                .mode("append") \
                .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
                .save(gold_path)
            
            print(f"✅ Gold: Appended data for client_id = '{client_id}', file_sort = {current_file_sort}")
            print(f"📊 Records written: {gold_df.count():,}")
    else:
        # First run → Create new table with client_id partitioning
        gold_df.write \
            .format("delta") \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .partitionBy("client_id") \
            .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
            .save(gold_path)
        
        print(f"✅ Gold: Created table with data for '{client_id}'")
        print(f"📊 Records written: {gold_df.count():,}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Failed to write to Gold: {str(e)}")
    raise
